_meta.method: host-agent LLM classification (Claude) from `codelens symbols` digest

corpus_ingestion.name: Corpus Ingestion & Detection
corpus_ingestion.rationale: Finds, classifies, converts and slices input files before extraction
corpus_ingestion.description: Discovers input files, classifies their type, converts Office/PDF/Google Workspace documents, transcribes media, and slices oversized files into extractable units.

ast_extraction.name: AST Extraction Engine
ast_extraction.rationale: tree-sitter structural extraction and cross-file symbol resolution
ast_extraction.description: Parses source files with tree-sitter across 30+ languages, emitting nodes/edges for classes, functions, imports and calls, then resolves cross-file symbol references.

external_ingestors.name: External Format Ingestors
external_ingestors.rationale: Non-source inputs: SCIP index, MCP configs, package manifests, DB introspection
external_ingestors.description: Ingests non-source structural inputs: SCIP code indexes, MCP server configs, package manifests, and live PostgreSQL/Cargo introspection.

semantic_llm.name: LLM Semantic Layer
semantic_llm.rationale: LLM backends, semantic fragment validation, entity dedup (MinHash/LSH)
semantic_llm.description: Multi-provider LLM calling for semantic extraction, validation/sanitization of LLM-produced graph fragments, and near-duplicate entity resolution via MinHash/LSH.

graph_build.name: Graph Build & Persistence
graph_build.rationale: NetworkX graph assembly, merge, validation, caching, multi-repo global graph
graph_build.description: Assembles extraction JSON into a NetworkX graph, merges incremental re-extractions, validates schema, caches results, and maintains the cross-repo global graph.

analysis.name: Analysis & Clustering
analysis.rationale: Leiden communities, god nodes, surprises, diagnostics, impact/PR analysis
analysis.description: Community detection, god-node and surprising-connection discovery, graph health diagnostics, and change-impact analysis for PRs.

query_serve.name: Query & Serving
query_serve.rationale: BFS/DFS traversal server, query logging, reflection memory, token benchmark
query_serve.description: Answers questions over the graph via BFS/DFS traversal (CLI and MCP server), logs queries, maintains reflection-based work memory, and benchmarks token savings.

export_report.name: Export & Reporting
export_report.rationale: graph.json/HTML/wiki/Cypher exporters and the audit report generator
export_report.description: Exports the graph to JSON/HTML/SVG/GraphML/Cypher/wiki formats and generates the human-readable audit report.
responsibilities: Build the wiki and callflow views

cli_integration.name: CLI & Host Integration
cli_integration.rationale: Entry point, host installs, commit hooks, folder watch, path/security utilities
cli_integration.description: The graphify CLI entry point, per-host skill installers (Claude/Copilot/Codex/...), git hooks, folder watching, and path/security utilities.
responsibilities: Manage commit hooks and folder watch
